title: 🌟 We’re Hiring: EVENT SALES & Marketing Executive 🚀
description:
💡 Ready to Turn Your Ambition into Achievement?
We’re looking for confident, motivated, and growth-driven individuals to join our dynamic EVENT SALES & Marketing team.
If you’re passionate about building connections, learning fast, and achieving real results — this is the opportunity you’ve been waiting for.


🌍 What You’ll Do

📈 Develop and execute marketing strategies to drive client growth and engagement
🤝 Build and maintain strong client relationships through excellent communication and service
💡 Represent brands with professionalism, creativity, and enthusiasm
🎯 Meet and exceed sales targets while contributing to a high-performing team culture

🚀 What You’ll Gain

✈️ Travel & Exposure
Collaborate with diverse clients, attend events, and gain real-world experience across industries and markets.

🤝 Mentorship & Coaching
Receive personalized guidance from experienced leaders committed to helping you reach your full potential.

📈 Career Advancement
A transparent path for growth — from learning the ropes to leading your own team or developing specialist expertise.

💬 Skill Development
Gain hands-on experience in sales, branding, communication, and leadership through structured training and workshops.

🌟 Who We’re Looking For

✅ Driven, curious, and eager to learn
✅ Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
✅ Adaptable, resilient, and goal-oriented
✅ Team players who bring positivity and initiative to every project

💎 What We Offer

💰 Competitive, performance-based compensation and incentives
📚 Ongoing professional development and leadership training
🌈 A collaborative, supportive, and high-energy work environment
🎯 Opportunities to work on global projects and brand campaigns


✨ This isn’t just another role — it’s your next big step.
If you’re ready to grow, challenge yourself, and build a rewarding career in Sales & Marketing…
👉 Apply now and start your journey with us today.


Whatsapp ME : 81714219 - Mak

postedCompany.description:
Our company specializes in offering face-to-face marketing services to organizations, providing them with a powerful way to connect with potential buyers.

In today's world, where digital communications dominate, we recognize that face-to-face sales are a crucial part of the marketing mix, providing a personalized and memorable experience for customers. Our services help our clients to introduce, advertise, sell and activate their products or brand through face-to-face marketing, enabling them to stand out in a crowded market and connect with customers in a more impactful way.

At our company, we believe that building strong relationships with our clients is key to providing exceptional service. We take the time to understand our clients' needs and become experts in their business and brand, enabling us to provide tailored marketing solutions that meet their goals.

Our clients come from a diverse range of industries, including telecommunications, pay TV, broadband, insurance, consumer products, transport, financial services, technology, fundraising, lifestyle, and energy, and we bring a wealth of experience and knowledge to each project.
postedCompany.name: STARSEARCH
